source.submodule: Array of structure and nested structure

topicTags: Array of structure and nested structure

content.problemStatement:
You are the leader of your class.\
Amongst your multiple tasks, you have to calculate the common birthdays of your classmates.

Given $N$ classmates' dates of birth in DD MM YYYY format, calculate the number of pairs of your classmates that share the same birthday.
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 10^3$
- $1 \leq N \leq 10^3$
- $1 \leq A_i \leq 10^9$
- The sum of $N$ over all testcases does not exceed $2\cdot 10^3$
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input will contain a single integer $N$, denoting the number of classmates.
- Each of the $N$ lines will contain 3 space-separated integers denoting date, month and year of birth of the $i^{th}$ classmate.
content.outputFormat: - Output a single integer - the number of pairs of your classmates that share the same birthday.
